mapper.sql: id, type, drug_id, drug_name, prescription_id, register_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, operator_id, operator_name, reason, transaction_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pharmacy_transaction WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM pharmacy_transaction WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM pharmacy_transaction WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
